title: Doctoralia - LATAM Doctor Discovery & Booking
problem: Patients in LATAM struggle to find doctors, check availability, and book appointments. Fragmented information across clinic websites, no reviews, no pricing transparency. Doctors lack efficient patient acquisition channels.
solution: Doctor discovery platform with profiles, reviews, online booking, and clinic information. Doctor dashboard for appointment management. Free listing for doctors, premium features for enhanced profiles and analytics.
technology: Web platform, mobile app, practice management software for doctors, booking system, review platform
traction_signals: Largest doctor listing platform in region
regulatory_notes: Medical advertising regulations vary by country
varden_fit: COMPETITOR - Directly competes with Varden's scheduling/booking. But they're consumer-facing, Varden could be B2B infrastructure provider to similar platforms.
notes: ZocDoc/Docplanner model for LATAM. Well-funded, pan-regional player. Varden should differentiate by going deeper on infrastructure/enterprise rather than consumer discovery.
